name: Tavin Limo Svc
recent_news: No web presence found; not surfaced in Stockbridge/Henry County GA limo or school transport directories as of 2026.
fit_notes: Too small (2 employees, ~$122K revenue) and appears to be a limo/livery operator rather than a yellow-bus contractor. Not a viable Summit tuck-in; no scaled school-bus route base.

name: Care Van Svc Inc
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER snapshot (USDOT 2200014) shows 3 power units, 1 driver, intrastate-only private passenger paratransit, no violations or crashes in trailing 24 months (2024-2026). No M&A or growth news.
fit_notes: Confirmed paratransit/senior transport micro-operator (3 vehicles) in rural Dane County WI, not a school-bus contractor. Not core Summit tuck-in; SPED/NEMT adjacency too small to move the needle. WI is also outside Summit's core footprint.

name: Limo Time West Inc
recent_news: No web presence or news found; not listed in Carrollton City Schools transportation directory or any GA school-bus carrier list as of 2026.
fit_notes: Appears to be a single-owner limo/livery operator (2 employees, ~$121K revenue) in Carrollton GA, not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: A & B Van Svc Inc
recent_news: Listed on Manta as a Staten Island bus rental/charter operator established 1985; does not appear in NYC DOE approved school-age bus companies list or NYSDOT Article 19-A preferred operator roster as of 2026.
fit_notes: Long-tenured (since 1985) but micro-scale (~2 employees, ~$117K revenue) Staten Island van operator. Not on NYC DOE approved school-bus carrier list, so unlikely to hold a yellow-bus route base. Owner-operator family business; not a meaningful Summit tuck-in.

name: JJ Limousines Inc
recent_news: No school-transport contract or M&A news found; Melbourne FL limo market is dominated by JJ's Hot Rayz Limousines (separate company, owner JJ Hollis since 2008) — JJ Limousines Inc (Shaenbaum) has no surfaced web footprint as of 2026.
fit_notes: Micro limo/livery operator (~2 employees, ~$116K revenue) in Brevard County FL — not a school-bus contractor and not on any Florida school transport vendor list. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.
